# Frame Roofing Utah

> Utah's top-rated roofing and restoration contractor serving 40+ communities across the Wasatch Front. Licensed under Utah DOPL #14256097-5501.

## About
Frame Roofing Utah is a licensed, insured roofing and restoration company based in Heber City, Utah. We specialize in residential and commercial roofing, storm damage restoration, and insurance claim coordination. We serve Salt Lake City, Park City, Heber City, Sandy, Draper, Provo, Ogden, and 35+ other Utah communities along the Wasatch Front.

## Owner
- Landon Yokers, Owner & Lead Estimator

## Services
- [Residential Roofing](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/residential-roofing): Full reroof, architectural shingles, metal roofing, flat roofing
- [Commercial Roofing](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/commercial-roofing): TPO, EPDM, built-up, metal systems
- [Storm Damage Restoration](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/storm-damage-restoration): Hail, wind, fallen tree damage repair
- [Insurance Claims](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/insurance-claims): Full adjuster coordination and documentation
- [Roof Repair](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/roof-repair): Leak repair, flashing, emergency tarping
- [Roof Replacement](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/roof-replacement): Complete tear-off and replacement
- [Gutters](https://frameroofingutah.com/pages/gutters): Seamless gutters and gutter guards

- Licensed: Utah DOPL #14256097-5501
- Rating: 5.0 stars (Google Business Profile)
- Address: 142 S Main St, Heber City, UT 84032
- Phone: 435-292-8802
- Coverage: 80km radius from Heber City covering Salt Lake Valley and Wasatch Front
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 8AM-6PM
- Certifications: CertainTeed, Tamko certified installer
